title: Where your tax dollars go: my budget priorities for District 4
description: Councilmember Reyes walks through her budget priorities for the upcoming fiscal year, including her $4.8 million parks request.

title: Why I voted to close Riverside Park (yes, really)
description: Reyes explains her vote on the Riverside Park closure and what the four-month timeline means for District 4 families.

title: About the contractor — answering your questions
description: Reyes responds directly to constituent concerns about Meridian Infrastructure being awarded the Riverside Park contract.

title: Riding the 14 bus to Lincoln Park — what's missing
description: Reyes rides the 14 bus from her district to Lincoln Park and talks about transit gaps during the Riverside closure.

title: Town hall clip: a District 4 mom asks about playground safety
description: Clip from the March 25 District 4 town hall: a parent asks Councilmember Reyes about playground safety standards in the new design.
